title: categoriesTreeNode_Full

id.description: The unique numeric ID of the category; increments sequentially.

parent_id.description: The unique numeric ID of the categoryʼs parent. This field controls where the category sits in the tree of categories that organize the catalog.

name.description: The name displayed for the category. Name is unique with respect to the categoryʼs siblings.

is_visible.description: Flag to determine whether the product should be displayed to customers browsing the store. If `true`, the category will be displayed. If `false`, the category will be hidden from view.

url.description: The custom URL for the category on the storefront.

description: Used to reflect parent <> child category relationships. Used by Category Tree.
